sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports difficulty starting urination and stomach pain. He also reports burning pain in his left hand. The patient reports pain in the left hand.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient's lymph nodes are swollen. Blood pressure is 110/70 mmHg. Heart rate is 72 bpm. Neurological exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has obstructive neuropathy, chronic kidney disease, and possible breast cancer given family history. He also has diabetes and hypertension.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Start Tylenol 650mg every 6 hours as needed for pain. Order a genetic panel. Schedule follow-up with nephrology in 4 weeks. Counsel the patient on increasing fluid intake and slow positional changes to manage orthostatic symptoms.
